{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Endross lightning wyrm
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|An [[Endross lightning wyrm]] is a creature that crawls through the air and shoots massive blasts of lightning.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
